description: Testing various ways to trigger and open dialog/popup including mouse clicks and keyboard navigation.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check open dialog box 
+ Click into button/link which opens dialog box
+ Double click into button/link which opens dialog box
+ Click TAB to move to button/link which opens dialog box
expected_result:
+ Dialog/Popup is displayed without error
+ Contents under Popup/Dialog are clickable/inclickable [base on each spec]
+ Background under Popup/Dialog is changed into white cover  [base on each spec]

description: Testing visual elements, content display, and interactive features of dialog/popup including button behaviors and keyboard interactions.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check layout
+ Position of dialog/popup
+ Title: position, text content, style
+ Description: position, text content, style
+ Close/ OK/ Cancel button: position, text content, style, 2D 3D style
+ Icon
+ Background color
expected_result: All items display corrrectly as designed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check action with ACTIVE button in Dialog/Popup
+ Click button Close / OK / Cancel / button [X]
+ Double click button Close / OK / Cancel / button [X]
+ Click Tab to move to button Close / OK / Cancel / button [X] and click Enter
+ Click [ESC] to close popup
expected_result:
+ Dialog/Popup is closed and nothing change when click/double click Close
+ Dialog/Popup is closed and nothing change when click/double click Cancel
+ If data is valid, Dialog/Popup is closed and do action in dialog when click/double click OK 
+ If data is invalid, show error message when click/double click OK

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check action with INACTIVE button in Dialog/Popup
+ Click button 
+ Double click button 
+ Click Tab to move to button and click Enter
expected_result: Nothing happens, cannot click on inactive buttons

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check action with link/other buttons in Dialog/Popup
+ Click link
+ Double click link
+ Click tab to move to link/other buttons in Dialog/Popup and click Enter
expected_result: + Open the page of that link/button in the same tab / in new tab [base on each spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check order focus on Dialog/Popup when press Tab key
expected_result: Focus on dialog/popup only, move focus with correct order as spec: from left to right, top to bottom, skip all other items on backgound screen...

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click on any area on Dialog/Popup (not buttons, links)
expected_result: Dialog/Poup keeps unchanged

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select text in Dialog/Popup, Ctrl C Ctrl V
expected_result:
Dialog/Poup keeps unchanged
Can copy paste text in dialog/popup properly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Select text in Dialog/Popup, right click and click Copy button
expected_result:
Dialog/Poup keeps unchanged
Can copy paste text in dialog/popup properly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Place cursor on Dialog/Popup and Ctrl A
expected_result:
Dialog/Poup keeps unchanged
Text is selected properly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Drag to move dialog/popup to another position
expected_result: Can move dialog/popup to another position properly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click on 4 corners of dialog/popup to widen that dialog/popup
expected_result: Can widen dialog/popup properly

item_type: Check display of dialog/popup when do another action in screen
description: Testing dialog/popup behavior during various user interactions and system events.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click outside Dialog/popup
expected_result: Dialog/Popup is closed/not closed  [Base on your spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check clicking on any items on the screen when the popup is opening
expected_result: There is no interaction

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of dialog/popup when displaying duration < <dismiss-on-timeout value>
expected_result: Dialog/Popup keeps displaying properly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of dialog/popup when displaying duration = <dismiss-on-timeout value>
expected_result:
Dialog/Popup displays and auto-closed when = <dismiss-on-timeout value>
(confirm that timeout value is enough for customer reading full content of dialog/popup)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of dialog/popup when displaying duration > <dismiss-on-timeout value>
expected_result: Dialog/Popup auto closed

test_view_points.viewpoint: Scroll up/down/left/right on screen while displaying dialog/popup (Check if background screen is too long or too wide)
expected_result: Dialog/Popup keeps displaying properly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Re-load screen while displaying dialog/popup
expected_result: Dialog/Popup is closed and nothing change

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of popup/dialog screen when zoom in/zoom out screen
expected_result: Zoom in/out without error or broken layout

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of popup/dialog screen when rotate left/right screen
expected_result: Rotate popup/dialog without error or broken layout
